title: Senator Eric Schmitt: Exposing the Biggest Censorship Scandal in US History
description:
(0:00) Sacks and Jason welcome Senator Eric Schmitt

(2:34) Biden v. Missouri, uncovering government censorship as Missouri AG

(6:06) Section 230 and social media, the legacy of Russiagate, big tech censorship in the age of AI

(18:44) Behind the Hunter Biden laptop story and COVID censorship

(30:17) The NGO "Leviathan" and how censorship requests were laundered, Hamilton 68

(36:38) Russiagate and the Obama intel report on the 2016 Election

(47:15) Russia-Ukraine War, possible peace deal, and US foreign policy

Buy The Last Line of Defense: How to Beat the Left in Court:

https://www.harpercollins.com/products/the-last-line-of-defense-eric-schmitt

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses government censorship with Senator Eric Schmitt, covering topics such as the Biden v. Missouri case, Section 230, and the Hunter Biden laptop story. They also delve into the Russia-Ukraine War and US foreign policy. Senator Schmitt shares his experiences as Missouri AG and his new book, The Last Line of Defense.

takeaways.text: Government censorship is a major issue in the US
Section 230 reform is needed to address big tech censorship
The Hunter Biden laptop story was censored by big tech
The Russia-Ukraine War has implications for US foreign policy
Censorship can have significant consequences for democracy
The legacy of Russiagate continues to impact US politics
Reform is needed to prevent censorship and promote free speech

quotes.text: Censorship is a threat to democracy
quotes.speaker: Senator Eric Schmitt

quotes.text: Big tech is out of control
quotes.speaker: Jason

sentiment.notes: The mood is cautious due to the discussion of government censorship and its implications for democracy. The hosts and guest express concern about the consequences of censorship and the need for reform.

notable_moments.description: The Hunter Biden laptop story is discussed
The Russia-Ukraine War and US foreign policy are discussed
